name: Playlist Curator
author: rendyhd
description: Build, extend, preview, deduplicate, and save playlists with metadata filters and weighted embedding similarity.

versions.changelog: Correct the minimum AudioMuse version after verifying compatibility with 2.6.0 and 2.6.1; runtime behavior is unchanged.
Initial plugin release of Smart Search, Playlist Extender, weighted influence, duplicate review, audio preview, and media-server playlist saving.
